title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium Quilted Hybrid 15" Mattress

seo.title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium 15" Hybrid Mattress | LA Mattress
seo.description: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium — 15" hybrid with 7-Series pocketed coils and HD edge support. 20-year warranty. Queen $1,599 with free same-day LA delivery + 120-night exchange.

metafields.custom.tagline: The default-yes 15" hybrid — medium feel for two sleep styles in one bed.
metafields.custom.lede: Diamond's Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium is the same 15-inch hybrid build as the Plush variant, dialed to a 5–6 / 10 medium feel. CertiPUR HD comfort layers sit over a 7-Series individually pocketed coil unit with HD foam-encased edges. A cool-temperature quilted top finishes the build. Backed by a 20-year warranty.
custom.best_for: Couples who sleep in different positions
Back sleepers who want some give without dropping the hips
Combo sleepers who switch sides during the night
Most first-time hybrid buyers — medium is the safest first try
custom.not_ideal_for: Side sleepers who need maximum shoulder pressure relief — go Plush
Stomach sleepers needing a flat-spine feel — go Firm

description_html:
The Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium is a 15-inch quilted hybrid mattress at a true medium feel — Diamond's most-asked-for build because it works for the widest range of sleepers. Same 7-Series pocketed coil unit and HD foam-encased edges as the Plush, with a comfort stack dialed back to a 5–6 / 10 surface.

What's inside

  • Cool-temperature regulating quilt — phase-change yarns pull heat off the sleep surface.
  • Air Response Foam — open-cell top layer that breathes and rebounds without trapping heat.
  • CertiPUR-US HD comfort foams — independently certified for low-VOC content; tuned as the transition stack to the coil unit.
  • 7-Series Individually Pocketed Coils — each coil moves on its own; spinal support without telegraphing partner motion.
  • HD Foam-Encased Edge Support — high-density perimeter so the bed is usable to the edge.

Who it's for

Medium is the default-yes feel: 5–6 / 10. Back sleepers get spinal support, side sleepers get enough give to relieve the shoulder, stomach sleepers get a flat-enough surface for short stints. If you're shopping for two and you don't already know exactly what you want, this is the build to try first. Side sleepers who need maximum shoulder pressure relief should look at the Plush variant; strict stomach sleepers, the Firm.

Sizes & prices

Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King. Queen from $1,599.

What's included

  • Free white-glove delivery + setup anywhere in Los Angeles on $499+ orders.
  • Free haul-away of your old mattress on every Queen+ delivery.
  • Same-day delivery on orders placed by 4 p.m.
  • 120-night comfort exchange.
  • 20-year Diamond Mattress warranty.
